description_long: This helicopter features a streamlined, compact fuselage with a rounded nose and a single main rotor mounted on top. The body is primarily black with metallic silver structural elements, and the rotor blades are long, slender, and black with yellow tips. The tail boom extends straight back, ending in a small vertical stabilizer and a tail rotor mounted on the right side. The landing skids are metallic and robust, providing stable ground support with crossbars for reinforcement. The cockpit area is defined by a large, dark-tinted window that wraps around the front, offering wide visibility for the pilot and co-pilot. No visible registration numbers or additional markings are present on the exterior.
description: A compact, black and silver helicopter with a rounded nose, long main rotor, and metallic landing skids. The cockpit features a large, dark-tinted wraparound window.
description_view_0: Narrow front view showing the rounded nose, dark cockpit window, and the slim profile of the landing skids.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the main rotor, the straight tail boom, and the large cockpit window.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the tail boom, tail rotor, and the symmetrical landing skids.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, displaying the main rotor, tail boom, and cockpit window from the other side.
attribute_rotor_blades: Two long, slender main rotor blades made of composite material, colored black with yellow tips, extending symmetrically from the rotor hub.
attribute_tail_rotor: A small, two-bladed tail rotor mounted vertically on the right side of the tail boom, colored black with a metallic hub.
attribute_landing_skids: Pair of metallic silver landing skids with a tubular shape, reinforced by crossbars and angled supports, providing stable ground contact.
attribute_cockpit_windows: One large, curved, dark-tinted cockpit window wrapping around the front and sides, framed by metallic supports.
